title: helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. bracteiferum
intro: Helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. bracteiferum, also known as the Cape aloe or yellow alpine, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. bracteiferum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting skin health, as well as alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
